Organizational Transformation
Dr. Phillip Meade, Ph.D.
Systemic Leadership & Culture Change
"The best organizations align leadership, culture, and strategy — and that alignment starts with the courage to face complexity head-on."

About

With over 30 years of transformational leadership experience, Dr. Meade brings evidence-based insights and practical wisdom to organizations navigating complexity. As a senior leader at NASA, he led the cultural transformation following the Space Shuttle Columbia accident, guided the workforce transition during the Space Shuttle retirement, and helped reinvent Kennedy Space Center into the world's busiest commercial spaceport.

Today, he works with Fortune 500 companies, high-growth tech firms, and international consulting groups to drive meaningful, lasting organizational change through deep systems thinking and authentic leadership development.

Keynote Topics

Why A Good Culture Doesn't Matter — The Missing Links

Reveals how even the brightest teams overlook invisible risks and how to reimagine organizational culture for sustainable, high-trust performance.

Succeeding at Transformational Change

Discover why 70% of transformation initiatives fail and how to integrate cultural development with system implementation for lasting results.

Leading From the Inside Out

Why authentic leadership is the critical foundation that determines whether your organizational initiatives will soar or stall.

Credentials

Ph.D. Industrial Engineering
30 Years at NASA
MIT Business Dynamics
Harvard Negotiation Program
Licensed Human Element®
2 Patents
20+ Publications
Co-author: The Missing Links

Book Dr. Phillip Meade

Contact us to discuss availability and event details.

Leadership Communication
Patricio Larrea, MBA
Executive Presence & Communication Strategy
"Leadership begins with clarity and becomes powerful through courage and purpose."

About

Patricio Larrea believes leadership begins with clarity and becomes powerful through courage and purpose. For more than 15 years, he has helped leaders across the Americas communicate in ways that inspire trust, ownership, and action.

His path is anything but conventional. Trained as an architect, Patricio first led teams in high-pressure construction environments where communication was not optional. It directly impacted safety, performance, and results. That experience shaped his pragmatic view: when words are unclear, consequences are real.

Now Partner and Chief Growth Officer at The Humphrey Group, Patricio helps leaders navigate tension, take a stand, and speak with impact. As a Forbes contributor and advisor to Fortune 500 executives, he brings a rare blend of structure, humanity, and real-world insight to the stage.

Keynote Topics

Speak to Inspire

How to communicate with clarity and presence so your message inspires trust and drives action. Delivered as a keynote at UBC Sauder.

Owning It: How to Lead with Accountability and Inspire It in Others

How leaders can model ownership and build a culture where people take responsibility for outcomes. Delivered as a keynote for Starbucks.

The Power of Stories

How leaders can use narrative to communicate vision, build connection, and make their ideas stick.

Credentials

Partner & CGO, The Humphrey Group
MBA
Forbes Contributor
15+ Years Across the Americas
Keynotes: Starbucks, UBC Sauder
Fortune 500 Advisor
Bilingual: English & Spanish

Book Patricio Larrea

Contact us to discuss availability and event details.

Entrepreneurship & Purpose
J. Sebastian Uzcategui
Speaker, Entrepreneur & Coach
"Rooted in purpose. Driven by passion. Built on integrity. Your greatest obstacle might just be the stage you haven't stepped on yet."

About

J. Sebastian Uzcategui's life has been shaped by a relentless pursuit of purpose, freedom, and impact. Born in Venezuela and raised in Florida from the age of three, he carried both the hopes and the sacrifices of his family and spent his life turning that pressure into purpose.

He discovered entrepreneurship early. At 14 he began studying the stock market, at 16 he launched his first business, and by 18 he founded Stocks University, a platform that has educated over 1,200 students in financial literacy and trading. Then public speaking changed everything. Through a handful of key events, Sebastian quadrupled his business and scaled it to multiple six figures, not through ads or algorithms, but by standing in rooms, telling the truth, and serving people with integrity.

Since then he has spoken at over 300 events across churches, conferences, schools, and workshops. Through Speak Up Express, he now empowers aspiring speakers and entrepreneurs to refine their voice, step into their authority, and reach global platforms.

Keynote Topics

Public Speaking & Confidence

How finding your voice can transform your business and life, drawn from the events that scaled Sebastian's company to multiple six figures.

Faith & Purpose-Driven Leadership

A call to lead from a foundation of faith, integrity, and conviction, aligning ambition with values and leading with purpose.

Entrepreneurship & Resilience

The real story behind building a business: setbacks, grind, and the mindset to persevere. Lessons from founding Stocks University at 18.

Youth Empowerment & Personal Growth

Awakening potential in the next generation, showing young adults that anyone, regardless of background, can rewrite their story.

Credentials

Founder, Stocks University
1,200+ Students Educated
300+ Speaking Engagements
Founder, Speak Up Express
Bilingual: English & Spanish
